title: CRUD Operations
description: Operasi dasar Create, Read, Update, Delete di MySQL.

commands.name: SELECT
commands.title: Select (Read)
commands.syntax:
SELECT [DISTINCT] kolom1, kolom2 FROM tabel
[WHERE kondisi]
[GROUP BY kolom]
[HAVING kondisi]
[ORDER BY kolom [ASC|DESC]]
[LIMIT n [OFFSET m]];

commands.name: INSERT
commands.title: Insert (Create)
commands.syntax: INSERT INTO tabel (kolom1, kolom2) VALUES (nilai1, nilai2);

commands.name: UPDATE
commands.title: Update
commands.description: Mengubah data yang sudah ada di tabel.
commands.syntax: UPDATE tabel SET kolom1 = nilai1, kolom2 = nilai2 WHERE kondisi;
commands.warning: SELALU gunakan WHERE! UPDATE tanpa WHERE akan mengubah SEMUA baris.

commands.name: DELETE
commands.title: Delete
commands.warning: SELALU gunakan WHERE! DELETE tanpa WHERE akan menghapus SEMUA baris.

commands.name: REPLACE
commands.title: Replace
commands.description: Insert atau replace jika sudah ada (berdasarkan primary/unique key).
commands.syntax: REPLACE INTO tabel (kolom1, kolom2) VALUES (nilai1, nilai2);
commands.examples: REPLACE INTO settings (user_id, theme, language) VALUES (1, 'dark', 'id');
commands.notes: REPLACE melakukan DELETE lalu INSERT jika row sudah ada. ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE biasanya lebih baik.
